description_long: This is a vintage coupe car with a long, rounded body and a distinct two-tone color scheme, featuring a dark main body and lighter accents on the roof, bumpers, and trim. The car has a classic, elongated hood with chrome detailing and a prominent front grille, typical of mid-20th-century American automobiles. The windows are large and rectangular, with chrome trim outlining each pane, and the roofline gently slopes toward the rear, ending in a subtle tail fin. The wheels are partially covered by fender skirts, adding to the streamlined appearance. The front and rear bumpers are robust and chrome-plated, with integrated lights and decorative elements. The overall design suggests luxury and elegance, with attention to detail in the trim and proportions.
description: A vintage, two-tone coupe car with a long, rounded body, chrome trim, and a gently sloping roofline. Features include large windows, fender skirts, and prominent chrome bumpers.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the elongated hood, chrome grille, and detailed front bumper.
description_view_1: Front-side view highlighting the side profile, large windows, and the streamlined fender skirts.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view displaying the sloping roofline, tail fins, and chrome rear bumper.
description_view_3: Rear-side view emphasizing the tail design, rear window, and the car's overall length.
